action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Murphy, Doyle, Arney, Bare, Billings, Brown, Dittrich, Donovan, Fitzgerald, Joers, Johnson, Kreibich, McCarville, O'Connor, Ortiz-Velez, Palmeri, Prado, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Snyder, Udell, Wichgers and Zimmerman; 
cosponsored by Senators Testin, Hesselbein, Cabral-Guevara, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Larson, Marklein, Ratcliff, Roys, Spreitzer, Wall and Wirch
